queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Jellyfin Server %' AND publisher = 'The Jellyfin Project';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Jellyfin Server %' AND publisher = 'The Jellyfin Project' AND version_compare(version, '10.11.11') < 0);
